steps.title: Find the slope from two graph points
steps.content:
From the graph, at x = 100 K, the volume is approximately 4.5 L. At x = 300 K, the volume is approximately 13.5 L.

Using the slope formula:
$$m = \frac{13.5 - 4.5}{300 - 100} = \frac{9}{200}$$

steps.title: Write the equation and evaluate at x = 200 K
steps.content:
The relationship is linear and passes through the origin, so the equation is $y = \frac{9}{200}x$.

At x = 200:
$$y = \frac{9}{200} \cdot 200 = 9 \text{ liters}$$

This matches choice B — B is correct.
